0:
SELECT MAX(`Free Meal Count (K-12)` / `Enrollment (K-12)`)
FROM frpm
WHERE `County Name` = 'Alameda'
AND `Free Meal Count (K-12)` IS NOT NULL
AND `Enrollment (K-12)` > 0
1:
SELECT (`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm
WHERE `School Type` LIKE '%Continuation%'
   AND `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL 
   AND `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 0
   AND `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY (`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName1 IS NOT NULL THEN AdmFName1
        WHEN AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL THEN AdmFName2
        WHEN AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName3 IS NOT NULL THEN AdmFName3
    END AS FirstName,
    CASE 
        WHEN AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName1 IS NOT NULL THEN AdmLName1
        WHEN AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL THEN AdmLName2
        WHEN AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName3 IS NOT NULL THEN AdmLName3
    END AS LastName
FROM schools s
INNER JOIN satscores st ON s.CDSCode = st.cds
WHERE (
    (AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName1 IS NOT NULL) OR
    (AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL) OR
    (AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName3 IS NOT NULL)
)
ORDER BY st.NumGE1500 DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH TopNames AS (
    SELECT AdmFName1
    FROM schools
    WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY AdmFName1
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 2
),
RankedRecords AS (
    SELECT s.AdmFName1, s.District,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.AdmFName1 ORDER BY s.CDSCode) as rn
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN TopNames tn ON s.AdmFName1 = tn.AdmFName1
)
SELECT AdmFName1, District
FROM RankedRecords
WHERE rn = 1;

94:
SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) AS gap
FROM client c
INNER JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
INNER JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
INNER JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, dist.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1
95:
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district)
)
AND c.birth_date = (
    SELECT MAX(birth_date) 
    FROM client 
    WHERE district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id 
        FROM district 
        WHERE A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district)
    )
)

254:
WITH element_combinations AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN a1.element <= a2.element THEN a1.element || '-' || a2.element
            ELSE a2.element || '-' || a1.element
        END AS element_pair,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM connected c
    INNER JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    INNER JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    GROUP BY element_pair
),
max_combination AS (
    SELECT MAX(bond_count) AS max_bonds
    FROM element_combinations
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(max_bonds AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bond)) * 100 AS percentage
FROM max_combination;

    CAST((CAST(last_finisher.milliseconds AS REAL) - CAST(champion.milliseconds AS REAL)) / CAST(last_finisher.milliseconds AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races r
    INNER JOIN results champion ON r.raceId = champion.raceId
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT * 
        FROM results

955:
SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, INSTR(res.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 4, 
            CASE 
                WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 4), '.') > 0 
                THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 4), '.') - 1
                ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 4))
            END
        ) AS REAL)
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    results res
JOIN 
    races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE 
    res.position = 1                    -- Only champions
    AND res.time IS NOT NULL            -- Only finished races
    AND r.year < 1975                   -- Before year 1975
    AND res.time NOT LIKE '+%'          -- Exclude relative times (which are for non-champions)
GROUP BY 
    r.year
ORDER BY 
    r.year;

WITH TallestPlayer AS (
    SELECT p.player_name, p.player_api_id, p.height
    FROM Player p
    ORDER BY p.height DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
ShortestPlayer AS (
    SELECT p.player_name, p.player_api_id, p.height
    FROM Player p
    ORDER BY p.height ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
TallestAvgFinishing AS (
    SELECT tp.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) as avg_finishing
    FROM TallestPlayer tp
    INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON tp.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    GROUP BY tp.player_name
),
ShortestAvgFinishing AS (
    SELECT sp.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) as avg_finishing
    FROM ShortestPlayer sp
    INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON sp.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    GROUP BY sp.player_name
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN taf.avg_finishing >= saf.avg_finishing THEN taf.player_name
        ELSE saf.player_name
    END as player_name
FROM TallestAvgFinishing taf, ShortestAvgFinishing saf

WITH customer_consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM customer_consumption_2013
    GROUP BY Segment
),
segment_mins AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        min_consumption
    FROM min_consumption_per_segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM segment_mins WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM segment_mins WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_diff,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM segment_mins WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM segment_mins WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_diff,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM segment_mins WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM segment_mins WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_diff;
1482:
WITH consumption_by_year AS (
  SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
  FROM yearmonth y
  INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
percentage_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    CASE 
      WHEN consumption_2012 != 0 
      THEN ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2012) * 100 
      ELSE NULL 
    END AS percentage_increase
  FROM consumption_by_year
)
SELECT 
  Segment,
  percentage_increase
FROM percentage_changes
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

1526:
SELECT 
    CAST((t2012.total_consumption_2012 - t2013.total_consumption_2013) AS REAL) / t2012.total_consumption_2012 AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8) AS customer
    INNER JOIN 
    (SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption_2012 
     FROM yearmonth 
     WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' 
     GROUP BY CustomerID) AS t2012 ON customer.CustomerID = t2012.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN 
    (SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption_2013 
     FROM yearmonth 
     WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' 
     GROUP BY CustomerID) AS t2013 ON customer.CustomerID = t2013.CustomerID
